underlying_goal: Resume work on Phase 57.4 (audit skill design) and deliberate on the taxonomy/framework for audits, exploring conceptual gray areas before planning
friction_detail: Claude initially overrode researcher model to sonnet against memory rules (3rd occurrence of same mistake), misunderstood the cross-model delegation mechanism's current state, and was pushed back on for framing gaps as framework problems rather than situational responses
brief_summary: User wanted to deliberate deeply on the audit framework taxonomy for Phase 57.4; through extensive philosophical exploration they co-developed a three-axis obligations-based model, captured it in a deliberation doc, and paused before formal planning.
